rows.label: Recent blockspace
rows.detail: non-financial blockspace over the last 90 days
rows.methodology: Source classification of financial and non-financial blockspace
rows.caveat: Rounded current claims should cite the live Bitcoin Portal or a newer dated source

rows.label: Permanent chain data
rows.methodology: Source blockchain analytics pipeline classifying financial, Ordinals, OP_RETURN, and other data
rows.caveat: This is a lower-bound-style headline from the dated source, not a live chain-size measurement

rows.label: UTXO set growth
rows.source: Local committed Statoshi UTXO set snapshot
rows.methodology: Committed Statoshi UTXO database size series
rows.classificationDefinition: Aggregate UTXO database size, not attribution by itself
rows.caveat: Attribute spam-related share using inscription-related UTXO data, not this trend alone

rows.label: Dust-like UTXOs
rows.detail: of all UTXOs are under 1000 sats
rows.methodology: UTXO set dump grouped by output value
rows.classificationDefinition: Dust-like means under 1000 sats for this section
rows.caveat: The report notes the analysis will be updated for false identification of scripts under 37 bytes as P2MS outputs

rows.label: Taproot UTXOs
rows.detail: of Taproot UTXOs are under 1000 sats
rows.methodology: UTXO set dump filtered to p2tr outputs and grouped by output value
rows.classificationDefinition: p2tr is Pay to Taproot; dust-like means under 1000 sats
rows.caveat: This card keeps the report value exact instead of rounding it to about 90%

rows.label: Inscription-related UTXOs
rows.detail: of all UTXOs are inscription-related by source definition
rows.methodology: UTXOs created in transactions whose inputs contain witness OP_FALSE OP_IF
rows.classificationDefinition: Inscription-related UTXOs per Mempool Research methodology
rows.caveat: This is attribution evidence for UTXO-set impact; keep separate from aggregate UTXO database growth

dustStats.label: Sub-1000 p2tr share
dustStats.detail: of under-1000 sat UTXOs are p2tr

utxoBreakdown.caveat: Dust-like means under 1000 sats in this site section

chainGrowth.label: Chain growth acceleration
chainGrowth.detail: average block size before block 770,000 versus after block 770,000
chainGrowth.methodology: Pre-770,000 SegWit-to-770,000 average versus post-770,000-to-present average
chainGrowth.caveat: The report attributes the shift to sustained backlog plus inscriptions

notes: Use 40% and 90 GB only after a newer source verifies them
Different sources classify non-financial activity differently
Local generated data is a committed snapshot and may lag live sources
Aggregate UTXO growth is not the same claim as inscription-related UTXO attribution
